name: jakobmusik
description: A collection of Claude Code plugins: phone push notifications (notify) and the local-overlay / clean-remote publishing workflow (clean-remote). Add more plugins over time.

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Phone push notifications (via ntfy.sh) when Claude Code stops and is awaiting you, asks you a multiple-choice question, or hits a permission prompt. The title is '<session name>@<cwd>@<user>' and the body is your last message. The topic persists across plugin updates.

plugins.name: clean-remote
plugins.description: Keep planning and agent-helper files tracked locally with full history while publishing one clean, scrubbed commit to a public remote; a pre-push hook makes the exclusion enforced, not just habitual.
